context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Add toast notification styles with slide-in animation and auto-fade-out. Remove the #location-btn.error style since it's been replaced by the toast.
implementation: Toast container is fixed at bottom-right above action buttons. Individual .toast elements slide in from the right, stay visible for 5s, then fade out via .hiding class. Uses the existing dark nautical design tokens.
